# Jusi H2O

> Tampa Bay's trusted water filtration and treatment specialists since 2011. Founded by Marquis Pendergrass, serving Hillsborough, Pinellas, Manatee, Sarasota, and Polk counties with water softeners, whole-house filtration, reverse osmosis, and free in-home water testing. 2,500+ five-star reviews. 7 NSF certifications.

## About

Jusi H2O was founded in 2011 by Marquis Pendergrass and has served Tampa Bay homeowners for 15+ years. The company operates with a team of 10+ certified water treatment technicians within a 50-mile service radius across five Florida counties. Trust signals: 2,500+ five-star Google reviews, WQA certified, NSF-42, NSF-44, NSF-53, NSF-55, NSF-58, NSF-401 certified, licensed and insured in Florida.

Contact: (813) 303-0515 | 7901 4th St N Ste 300, St. Petersburg, FL 33702 | support@jusih2o.com | https://jusih2o.com

## Services

- [Water Softener Installation](https://jusih2o.com/services/water-softeners): Eliminates hard water scale, protects appliances, improves skin and hair. NSF-44 certified systems.
- [Whole-House Water Filtration](https://jusih2o.com/services/water-filtration): Removes chlorine, sediment, and contaminants at every faucet. Custom-sized for your home.
- [Reverse Osmosis Systems](https://jusih2o.com/services/reverse-osmosis): Under-sink drinking water purification removing up to 99% of contaminants. NSF-58 certified.
- [Free Water Testing](https://jusih2o.com/services/water-testing): Free in-home test for 10+ parameters including hardness, chlorine, pH, iron, and TDS. Same-day results.
- [Well Water Treatment](https://jusih2o.com/services/well-water): Custom treatment removing iron, sulfur, bacteria, and sediment from Florida well water.
- [Water Heater Installation](https://jusih2o.com/services/water-heater-installation): Tankless and traditional water heater installation and replacement. Same-day service available.
- [Leak Repair](https://jusih2o.com/services/leak-repair): Advanced leak detection using acoustic listening devices and thermal imaging. Minimally invasive.
- [Commercial Plumbing & Water Treatment](https://jusih2o.com/services/commercial-plumbing): High-capacity systems for restaurants, offices, and medical facilities.
- [JusiCare+ Protection Plan](https://jusih2o.com/services/jusicare): $199/year. Quarterly salt refills, filter changes, system sanitation, priority scheduling, lifetime warranty.

## Service Areas

- [Hillsborough County, FL](https://jusih2o.com/water-softener-in-hillsborough-county-fl): Tampa, Brandon, Plant City, Temple Terrace

- Manatee County, FL: Bradenton, Palmetto, Lakewood Ranch
- Sarasota County, FL: Sarasota, Venice, North Port
- Polk County, FL: Lakeland, Winter Haven, Bartow

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the difference between a water softener and a water filter?
A water softener removes hardness minerals — calcium and magnesium — through ion exchange to prevent scale buildup. A water filter removes contaminants such as chlorine, sediment, heavy metals, and PFAS to improve taste, odor, and safety. Many homeowners benefit from both systems working together.

### How do I know if I need a water softener?
Signs of hard water include white scale deposits on faucets and showerheads, soap that lathers poorly, dingy laundry, and shortened appliance lifespan. A free water test measures hardness in grains per gallon (GPG); water above 7 GPG is typically considered hard and benefits from softening.

### How long does a water softener last?
A quality water softener typically lasts 15-25 years with proper maintenance. Annual salt replenishment, periodic resin bed cleaning, and a pre-filter to reduce sediment loading are the primary maintenance tasks that protect system longevity.

### Is softened water safe to drink?
Yes, softened water is safe to drink for most people. The ion exchange process adds a small amount of sodium — roughly 20-40 mg per 8 oz glass, depending on original hardness. Individuals on sodium-restricted diets may prefer a dedicated reverse osmosis tap for drinking water.

### How do I get started?
Getting started is simple: call or submit the online contact form to schedule a free consultation. During the consultation, goals and expectations are discussed, a site assessment is completed if needed, and a written proposal is delivered within 48 hours.
